name: Mussels Alla Marinara
recipeIngredient: 2 carrots, peeled and sliced into 1/2 inch slices
2 pounds mussels, scrubbed and beard removed
recipeInstructions:
This half-soup, half-stew recipe will serve 4 as an appetizer or two as the main course.
1. Coarsely chop the tomatoes and set aside.
2. In a Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Add carrots, onions, and garlic, and sauté for 3 to 4 minutes, or until softened.
4. Add wine, tomatoes, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil over high heat.
5. Add mussels, cover, and cook for 3 to 4 minutes, or until they have opened.
(Discard any that do not open).
